global.title: America’s best deal on a German mid-drive e-bike just got even more affordable
global.summary: If you’ve been waiting for an excuse to try a premium German-made mid-drive e-bike without paying premium German-made prices, Ride1Up may have just handed you one. The San Diego, California-based company has dropped the price of its Prodigy V2 to just $1,595, marking the lowest price we’ve seen yet

global.title: Tesla erases the past, CAT electrifies the future, and EV tech training TODAY
global.summary: On today’s time-traveling episode of Quick Charge, Tesla might be trying to erase evidence of FSD fraud, Caterpillar keeps trying to electrify the construction space, and time is rapidly running out on what’s left of the 30% home solar tax credit. more…

global.title: The Cadillac Lyriq costs $200 more for 2027, but it gains a key new feature
global.summary: What’s another $200? Prices for the 2027 Cadillac Lyriq increase by just $200 for the 2027 model year, but it will likely be worth it. more…

global.title: You’ve got ONE MONTH to safe harbor your solar project and get 30% off
global.summary: The window to claim a 30% tax credit on your solar panel project is closing July 4th, which means you’ve got just one month left to safe harbor your project and preserve your eligibility – keep reading to find out how. more…

global.title: Houston gets a solar, storage + electricity bundle for 6¢ per kWh
global.summary: Houston homeowners are getting a new way to get solar and battery storage without signing up for a decades-long loan. more…

global.title: BYD converts its popular electric hatch into a van with ‘class-leading range’ for $40,000
global.summary: BYD launched the purely electric van based on the Dolphin hatchback, one of the brand’s most popular EVs globally. more…

global.title: Audi reveals 1,001-hp Nuvolari hybrid supercar — so much for going all-electric
global.summary: Audi unveiled the Nuvolari today, a 1,001-hp hybrid supercar powered by a 4.0-liter V8 biturbo and three electric motors. Limited to 499 units at roughly $700,000 each, it is the most powerful and fastest production vehicle in the brand’s history. The reveal is notable for what it represents beyond

global.title: White House will dump $700M of public funds into costly, unreliable coal again
global.summary: The White House is announcing another waste of taxpayer dollars today, spending $700M to try to revive a dead energy source, saddling Americans with more pollution and infrastructure that is destined to go unused in short order. more…

global.title: Jackery HomePower 3600 Plus power station exclusives from $1,399, EGO Select Cut Touch Drive mower $543 low, Segway, more
global.summary: Leading our Thursday Green Deals is a pair of exclusive deals on Jackery’s 3,584Wh HomePower 3600 Plus Portable Power Station with or without a 500W solar panel at their second-lowest prices starting from $1,399. Right behind that, we spotted the advanced EGO Power+ 21-inch Select Cut Touch Drive Co

global.title: Nissan joins new ‘Cheaper Than China’ solid-state EV battery project
global.summary: After announcing a new three-year collaboration with Nissan to advance low-cost, solid-state EV batteries, Gelion’s tech may be the secret to leveling the playing field with China. more…
